compile_output: Success with warnings (ignoring nodiscard Status return in parquet_reader.h:378, non-critical)
notes: Query passes correctness validation. Performance: 11,960ms for 59M rows with 4-group aggregation. Row group pruning filters only 1.4% of data (1183/1200 groups remain after l_shipdate filter). Thread parallelism and Kahan summation implemented correctly. Primary bottleneck is likely I/O from reading 59M rows across 1183 row groups, followed by CPU-bound operations (string access for returnflag/linestatus, double arithmetic, hash table lookups).
